_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: Our data demonstrate that KSR1 expression is significantly increased at the mRNA (Fig. 1a, N=3) and protein levels (Fig. 1b, N=8). In addition, KSR1 shows increased localization to the plasma membrane and the nucleus
details: Showed significantly increased KSR1 expression at both mRNA and protein levels compared to normal Schwann cells, with increased localization to plasma membrane and nucleus
